name: Proton VPN

pricing.details: Free tier with limited servers. Paid plans from $4.99/month (annual). Bundled with Proton Mail.

description: VPN service operated by Proton AG, a Swiss company subject to Swiss privacy law. Offers a free tier with no data limits, and paid plans with extended server access.
rationale: Proton's Swiss incorporation provides meaningful jurisdictional protection. Client applications are open source and have received third-party audits. The free tier is functional and not artificially limited by speed or data caps — unusual in the VPN market. Email is required for account creation, which is a minor privacy trade-off relative to Mullvad.
